title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an associate professor at CU Boulder, advocates teaching AI through manual implementation and mathematical foundations rather than relying on the latest tools. He argues that this slow, hands-on approach to learning AI creates durable skills that remain valuable across technology cycles.
